content.en:
"It's not a pseudo-arcane-level time talent!"

While Ye Tian was stunned, he was also full of surprises.

At this time, under the copying talent, the talent of His Highness Tianxuan was unobstructed.

Protoss: Jin Xuan

Cultivation talent: Chaos level

Strength Talent: God

Extreme talent: God-level

Defense Talent: God-level

Swordsmanship Talent: No superior

Time Talent: Mystery

Healing Talent: God-level

Regeneration Talent: God-level

......

"The Arcane-level time talent, this is much stronger than the pseudo-Armaginal-level time talent, His Highness Tianxuan should have improved the time talent after entering the Ruins World. If this is the case, His Royal Highness Tianxuan should not have practiced the time magic power. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

If His Royal Highness Tianxuan cultivated a time magic power, it would be more terrifying, and even Ye Tian would be afraid of one or two.

"The Time Blade formed by the Arcane level Time Talent can reduce the lifespan of 1,000 years, and it must not be hit by the Time Blade of His Highness Tianxuan, otherwise the loss is not small!"

Ye Tian first copied the mysterious-level time talent of His Highness Tianxuan, and then copied the regeneration talent.

The regeneration talent is somewhat similar to the healing talent and the immortality talent, but the effect is regeneration, such as a broken arm, which can instantly regenerate flesh and regrow an arm.

Of course.

Under the effect of talents such as healing talents, immortal talents, and life talents, a new arm can also be regenerated, but the regeneration talent can grow directly, and the effect is better, but it will consume more power.

Therefore, the regeneration talent also has some use for Ye Tian, so it is natural to copy it.

His Royal Highness Tianxuan approached Ye Tian, and without saying a word, he directly performed a sword mastery.

"Sword Pole!"

Shout!!!!

A sword that surpassed the limit slashed through the air, and the speed was extremely fast.

In the face of this sword, Ye Tian was in a tight position, and the Tianyue Sword struck with all his might.

Bang!!!!

A sword collided, and the void rippled out.

Whew!!

Ye Tian and His Highness Tianxuan each retreated a distance.

"Your Invincible Constant-level Highness, it turns out that you have also reached this level!"

His Royal Highness Tianxuan was a little dignified.

The enemy of this level is indeed very difficult, and as a last resort, he is not willing to offend the other party to death, after all, the revenge of an invincible Constant-level Highness is enough to make the Protoss suffer heavy losses, and even he can't have time to rescue others.

However, it was impossible for him to just let Ye Tian go.

"Time Blade!"

An illusory blade of time appeared above the head of His Highness Tianxuan, aimed at Ye Tian, and seemed to be activated at any time.

"This is the Blade of Time, and it is the Blade of Time activated by the Arcane Time Talent, which can reduce your lifespan by 1000 years, and your lifespan may be far beyond that of an ordinary emperor, but if you cut your lifespan by 1000 years at one time, you must be distressed. As long as you apologize, apologize to our Protoss, and pay some compensation, I'm willing to forget it, how about it?"

His Royal Highness Tianxuan said.

"I don't think so!"

Ye Tian shook his head and rejected His Highness Tianxuan's proposal.

"Then don't blame me!"

His Royal Highness Tianxuan said coldly.

Although he was unwilling to fight with His Royal Highness the Invincible Eternal Ancient of the same level, it didn't mean that he couldn't fight.

In case Ye Tian didn't have much lifespan, and he hit the Time Blade many times, he really had a chance to kill Ye Tian.

"Time Blade, kill!"

His Royal Highness Tianxuan's mind moved, and the Blade of Time attacked Ye Tian at an extremely fast speed.

The Speed of the Time Blade is fast, as the Time Talent can warp time and affect the passage of time around it, thus affecting the enemy's thoughts, consciousness, and reactions.

Therefore, in the case of the same level, it is difficult to dodge the Blade of Time.

But Ye Tian is not hopeless to dodge, because he also has a talent for time.

Facing the Time Blade of His Highness Tianxuan, Ye Tian knew that he had to expose his time talent.

"Time Blade!"

Ye Tian also used the Time Talent and the Time Blade.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian's Time Blade was easily shattered by His Highness Tianxuan's Time Blade, and Ye Tian's Time Talent Power was also suppressed by His Highness Tianxuan's Time Talent Power.

However, Ye Tian was still a god-level spatial talent, and he was listed as a supreme talent at the same level as the time talent.

Under the effect of the god-level spatial talent, the surrounding space began to distort.

His Highness Tianxuan's Time Blade was first blocked by Ye Tian's Time Blade, and then affected by the spatial talent, and his attack speed was affected.

In this case, Ye Tian used the black feather to dodge the blade of time in time.

The first hit doesn't work!

"What, you also have a talent for time, and you also have a god-level space talent!"

His Royal Highness Tianxuan was a little jealous.

He also wanted a god-level spatial talent, but he already had a time talent, and even if he paid some price to add a spatial talent, it would be difficult to raise the spatial talent to the arcane level.

So, he gave up on the idea early on.

But now, Ye Tian has both time talent and space talent, and more importantly, Ye Tian's space talent has reached the god level, and the time talent has also reached the pseudo-mystical level.

"Kill!"

His Royal Highness Tianxuan continued to attack Ye Tian and fought with Ye Tian.

He originally wanted to fight with Ye Tian, and while Ye Tian was not paying attention, he would use the Blade of Time to reduce Ye Tian's lifespan.

But Ye Tian didn't want to continue to fight with His Royal Highness Tianxuan, and as soon as the black feather unfolded, it turned into a ray of light and went into the distance.

"Your Highness Tianxuan, I still have some things, I will meet you again, and I will have a good fight with you again!"

His Royal Highness Tianxuan wanted to chase after him, but when he thought that Ye Tian had a god-level spatial talent, and his strength was not weaker than him at all, he couldn't catch up at all.

Distance.

The other Protoss Highnesses froze.

Although Ye Tian was gone, they could see that His Royal Highness Tianxuan couldn't help Ye Tian, and even the Blade of Time was successfully dodged by Ye Tian.

They originally thought that His Highness Tianxuan would be able to successfully kill His Highness Ye Tian if he became an invincible-level Constant-level Highness, but they didn't expect that Ye Tian would also successfully step into the level of His Highness the Invincible-level Constant-Ancient.

"Let's go!"

His Royal Highness Tianxuan's face was gloomy, and he turned to leave.

The other side.

Ye Tian found a mountain peak, opened a temporary cave mansion, and began to retreat and cultivate.

First of all, what he had to do was to fuse the Arcane Time Talent.

"Armaginish time talent, fusion!"

The fusion process begins!

Half an hour later, Ye Tian successfully fused the time talent, and at this time, his time talent also successfully transformed.

【Time Talent: Mystery】

Ye Tian was extremely excited when he saw that his time talent had become an arcane level.

The ability to accelerate time was used immediately.

Wow!!!

The passage of time around it began to change, and it soon accelerated to a factor of 100.

100 times the time acceleration, which means that Ye Tian has been cultivating for 100 years in the time acceleration environment, and only a year has passed in the outside world, how exaggerated is such a cultivation speed.

Subsequently, Ye Tian also successfully fused the regeneration talent.

After resting for a few hours, Ye Tian was going to use the Mystery Level Time Talent to cultivate for a period of time.

He was going to cultivate the first set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Techniques to the consummation realm, and then inherit the second set of movements, so that his strength could be raised to a higher level.

At that time, if he encounters His Highness Tianxuan again, he will be able to completely suppress the other party.

"Time accelerates, 100 times!"

In the time acceleration environment, Ye Tian began to pose the first set of movements, and ran the first set of exercises.

Rumble!!!!

The terrifying crushing force acted on his body, and Ye Tian silently endured it.

Time passed little by little, and soon, Ye Tian couldn't bear it anymore, and his body was about to collapse, so he stopped running the first set of exercises in time and changed his posture.

After taking a moment to recover from his injuries, Ye Tian continued to cultivate.

In the blink of an eye, half a year had passed in the outside world, but Ye Tian had been cultivating for a full fifty years under the acceleration of time.

He didn't expect it to be so difficult for the first set of movements to be perfect, and it took him so long.

But in the end, Ye Tian still cultivated the first set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Techniques to the consummation realm on this day.

An hour!

Two hours!

Three hours!

Ye Tian kept swinging the first set of movements, motionless, his body completely withstood the crushing force of the first set of actions, and it would not cause his body to collapse at all.

This means that he has completely cultivated the first set of movements to the consummation realm!

At the same time, Ye Tian's physical strength was also much stronger than in the past, and his pure defense power had increased by several grades.

Ye Tian was not in a hurry to inherit the second set of movements, but first stabilized the first set of movements, and it took a while for him to completely stabilize the first set of movements before he entered the inheritance space behind the top stone gate of the Six Reincarnation Towers again.

Legacy space.

Ye Tian came here again, and then he made a second set of moves.

The second set of actions is very different from the first set of actions, even if Ye Tian completely withstood the crushing of the first set of actions, and his physical body was many times stronger than in the past, it was still difficult to withstand the crushing power of the second set of actions, it seemed that the second set of actions would increase the crushing power as his physical body became stronger.

Click!!

Ye Tian's body began to crack, and if he continued to maintain the second set of movements, his body would collapse and die.

At the critical moment, Ye Tian changed his movements, and the collapse of his physical body stopped.

"0.3 seconds, not bad!"

Ye Tian nodded secretly.

After repairing the injury, Ye Tian continued to perform the second set of movements, and turned on the time acceleration.

In this way, Ye Tian tried countless times in the time acceleration environment, and insisted on it longer than the last.

Due to the time to accelerate, it didn't take long for Ye Tian to successfully complete the inheritance assessment.

Rumble!!!!

A phantom shadow appeared on the Buddha statue corresponding to the second set of movements, and the phantom recorded a detailed exercise route, which was immediately integrated into Ye Tian's soul, and a large amount of information emerged.

So far, Ye Tian has successfully obtained the cultivation method of the second set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Technique.
